chunks.text: For over half a century, Berkeley EECS has been at the forefront of research that has led to important advancements in semiconductor and MEMS devices, design technology, computer architecture, operating systems and databases, and wired and wireless networking. Berkeley graduates are at the core of today’s Information Technology industry.

The EECS Department recognizes institutions which give to the department annually with first tier access to our graduating students. The EAB was established to help the department fulfill its mission of educating leaders, creating knowledge, and serving society.

From Business Insider power rankings to prizes for innovation, Berkeley EECS is a fountainhead of creative people and ideas. UC Berkeley is ranked #1 for VC-backed entrepreneurs in PitchBook’s University Rankings for 2025. UC Berkeley undergraduate alumni and undergraduates have over 1,804 founders and 1,650 new companies. The resulting companies have raised $69.0B.
